commands.name: init
commands.skillDescription: Initialize project with CLAUDE.md, STATE.md, and ROADMAP.md by following the canonical init command doc.
commands.safety: preserve existing project context; do not overwrite user-authored planning files without explicit confirmation.
commands.prompt: Open and follow .agents/skills/atlas-init/SKILL.md. Initialize workflow artifacts according to the canonical command.

commands.name: plan
commands.skillDescription: Create executable plan for the current phase (3-5 tasks). Reads the canonical plan command doc and produces/updates the current PLAN.md referenced from STATE.md. No implementation.
commands.safety: do not implement code; only produce plan artifacts.
commands.prompt: Open and follow .agents/skills/atlas-plan/SKILL.md. Produce only the plan artifacts.

commands.name: execute
commands.skillDescription: Execute the current plan (from STATE.md -> PLAN.md) by following the canonical execute command doc. Make code changes + run necessary checks.
commands.safety: prefer smallest change-set; keep diffs tight; run tests/linters when applicable.
commands.prompt: Open and follow .agents/skills/atlas-execute/SKILL.md. Execute plan tasks.

commands.name: status
commands.skillDescription: Check project progress and suggest the next action by following the canonical status command doc.
commands.safety: read and report state only; do not modify files.
commands.prompt: Open and follow .agents/skills/atlas-status/SKILL.md. Report current project workflow status.

commands.name: sync
commands.skillDescription: Restore project context after clear/new session by following the canonical sync command doc.
commands.safety: refresh context from canonical planning files and report concise status.
commands.prompt: Open and follow .agents/skills/atlas-sync/SKILL.md. Refresh context and summarize where to resume.

commands.name: triage
commands.skillDescription: Pull and triage issues from external sources for planning by following the canonical triage command doc.
commands.safety: keep source data traceable and avoid changing scope without explicit confirmation.
commands.prompt: Open and follow .agents/skills/atlas-triage/SKILL.md. Pull issues and triage according to the canonical workflow.

commands.name: complete
commands.skillDescription: Complete the current milestone and prepare next work by following the canonical complete command doc.
commands.safety: verify all phases are complete before closing milestone artifacts.
commands.prompt: Open and follow .agents/skills/atlas-complete/SKILL.md. Complete milestone workflow and update artifacts.

commands.name: review
commands.skillDescription: Review code changes and capture learnings for CLAUDE.md by following the canonical review command doc.
commands.safety: prioritize correctness and concrete evidence; avoid speculative findings.
commands.prompt: Open and follow .agents/skills/atlas-review/SKILL.md. Perform review workflow and capture findings.
